\begin{figure}[htbp]
  \centering
  \includegraphics[width=0.9\linewidth]{FIGURES/ch04_probe_noise_floor.pdf}
  \caption[Stillwater 95\% noise amplitude $(P_{97]{
    Stillwater 95\% noise amplitude $(P_{97.5} - P_{2.5})/2$ per ultrasound wave gauge, with no waves and no wind. Each panel shows one hardware configuration (probe height above still water / range mode). Blue bars: mean across accepted stillwater runs within each configuration (error bars: \pm 1\,std). White dots: individual run values. Quantization step $q = 0.03$--$0.05$\,mm per probe (P5 of nonzero sample-to-sample differences); Dashed red line: detection threshold $\max(3\,\sigma,\; 2\,q)$ per probe, where $\sigma$ is the rms noise; wave amplitudes below this line are indistinguishable from stillwater noise.
  }
  \label{fig:ch04_probe_noise_floor}
\end{figure}
